sentences.original: An anomaly which often struck me in the character of my friend Sherlock Holmes was that, although in his methods of thought he was the neatest and most methodical of mankind,

sentences.originalRu: Но и у меня есть предел,

sentences.translationRu: Но Холмс порой садился в кресло
